source.title: EmbedGuard: Cross-Layer Detection and Provenance Attestation for Adversarial Embedding Attacks in RAG Systems

comparison.interpretation: Archived full-system versus best-single-layer comparison; not causal isolation of the correlation mechanism.

limitations: The open repository does not contain Tier-1 sample counts, confidence intervals, raw observations, corpus, hardware evidence, or an executable cross-layer ablation.
